faqs.question: Why are crickets so common in Great Kills homes?
faqs.answer: Great Kills' location near Great Kills Park, wooded areas, and waterfront zones provides ideal cricket habitats with moisture and vegetation. Crickets are attracted to outdoor lighting and easily enter homes through gaps in foundations, windows, and doors, especially in late summer when populations peak and they seek shelter for winter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in my Great Kills home?
faqs.answer: Most Great Kills cricket infestations show significant reduction within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within one week. We use targeted interior treatments and exterior barrier applications to stop crickets at entry points and eliminate existing populations throughout your property.

faqs.question: What's included in your $350-$550 cricket control service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive cricket control includes a thorough property inspection, interior treatment of affected areas, exterior perimeter barrier application, identification and sealing of entry points, and removal of conducive conditions. Pricing varies based on property size, infestation severity, and whether ongoing prevention services are needed.
